entry.title: Bitcoin covenants are inevitable
entry.summary: The discussion around CheckTemplateVerify (CTV) in the programming community appears to be marked by contention and significant disagreement. Some individuals have expressed concerns that CTV is contentious, while others argue that this stance may be rooted in misinformation. The conversation highlights a need for higher standards of discourse within the community, urging participants to elevate their discussions beyond comparisons to known fact-checkers or public figures who are often embroiled in debates about information accuracy. This call to action suggests a collective effort to engage more critically and informatively when discussing technical topics such as CTV, aiming to foster a more informed and respectful environment.
